emailBody:
Dear Siemens AG team,

My name is Hannes Hennerbichler, representing Heise. I am visiting HANNOVER MESSE 2026 (April 20–24, Hannover) and would very much like to schedule a meeting at your booth (Hall 13, Stand C24).

My preferred time would be Mittwoch, 22. April 2026 at 11:00.

Topics I'd like to discuss:
Interesse an Automatisierungslösungen

Please let me know if this works for you, or suggest an alternative time that suits your schedule.

Best regards,
Hannes Hennerbichler
Heise
